data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 3,000 USDT with a 4.73% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 05, 2025, 19:00 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 3,000 USDT and is now trading at 2,992.5 USDT, with a narrowed 4.73% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Maryland man sentenced to 15 months for helping North Korean hackers infiltrate US tech firms
data.description:
A man in Maryland has been sentenced to a 15-month prison sentence and three years of supervised release after a revelation that he has been helping North Korea to place IT workers inside US companies covertly. For a cool 3 years, Minh Phuong Ngoc Vong used false credentials to secure jobs with at least 13 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/maryland-man-sentenced-to-15-months-for-helping-north-korean-hackers-infiltrate-us-tech-firms/

data.title: Crypto Winter Deepens As Altcoin Season Stalls And Only Zcash Manages A Lift
data.description:
Fear still hangs over altcoin season, but the sharp edge of panic has softened. The Crypto Fear and Greed Index is now 25, a modest recovery from November’s plunge near 10, yet the mood remains unsettled, and traders continue to move with hesitation rather than conviction. Bitcoin sits just above $91,000 after falling steadily from yesterday’s […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-winter-deepens-as-market-stalls-and-only-zcash-manages-a-lift/
